product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello there! I came across your listing for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV and I must say, I'm quite impressed with its features. I was wondering if there is any room for negotiation on the price? Looking forward to hearing from you soon. Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Hello! I'm glad to hear you're interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. It's a top-of-the-line model with amazing features. While I can't go below the wholesale price of $1,100, I'm open to discussing a competitive offer. What price were you thinking?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for considering a competitive offer. My budget for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV is $1,449.50. Would you be willing to meet that price?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your offer, but I'm unable to go below the wholesale price of $1,100 for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. Is there anything else I can assist you with or any other way we can work within your budget?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I understand, thank you for considering. Unfortunately, I must stick to my budget of $1,449.50. If there are any future promotions or discounts available, please let me know.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I completely understand. I'll keep your budget in mind and let you know if there are any future promotions or discounts available for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. Thank you for your interest!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for understanding. I appreciate your assistance and look forward to hearing from you regarding any future promotions or discounts for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: You're welcome! I'll be sure to keep you updated on any future promotions or discounts for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. Thank you for reaching out, and I'll be in touch soon. Have a great day!
